rows.description: + On a Review of ChaceHill Arr. by y Rector &c there appeared to have been a Mistake of five Shillings v one penny charged too much & Arrears tho have been only £24.18.03¾ which said sum is accounted for as Recd in y next Acc. & allowed to be in full.
rows.notes: Overridden based on visual verification and special case protocol. Selected gpt-5-mini for correct row_type 'header' as it's a narrative with no columnar amounts. Description derived primarily from gemini-flash for completeness, with minor visual corrections (e.g., 'y' for 'the', 'v' for 'and', '&c' after 'Rector', all as seen in the image).
rows.section_header: + On a Review of ChaceHill Arr. by y Rector &c there appeared to have been a Mistake of five Shillings v one penny charged too much & Arrears tho have been only £24.18.03¾ which said sum is accounted for as Recd in y next Acc. & allowed to be in full.
